2606.26902.title: Learning to Recover Task Experts from a Multi-Task Merged Model
2606.26902.paper_summary: Multi-task model merging aims to consolidate several task-specific experts into a unified model, yet static merging consistently suffers from parameter interference. While dynamic merging models aim to bridge this gap, many works rely on the costly storage and loading of redundant expert components at inference. In this work, from the perspective of task expert, we view parameter interference as parameter perturbation introduced to each expert during merging process. We show that such parameter perturbations can be modeled as affine transformation, which can be approximated as additive offsets. Motivated by these, we propose Recover Task eXpert (ReTeX), a framework that predicts those offsets, in order to undo parameter interference and recover task-expert performance from a single merged checkpoint. To recover the appropriate expert when task identity is unknown, we introduce a router-free task identifier based on SVD subspace signatures computed offline before inference. At inference, the identifier selects the task whose subspace yields the smallest projection residual for a given input. As a result, ReTeX recovers over 95% of individual-expert performance in both vision and NLP domains, while significantly improving generalization to unseen tasks. Crucially, we also show that the parameter offset prediction leads to emergent adaptive interpolation of expert knowledge for out-of-distribution (OOD) tasks. ReTeX adaptively interpolates seen expert knowledge to handle unseen tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/BAIKLAB/ReTeX
2606.26902.paper_summary_zh: 多任務模型合併旨在將幾個特定任務的專家整合為一個統一的模型，但靜態合併始終受到參數干擾的影響。雖然動態合併模型旨在彌補這一差距，但許多工作依賴於在推理過程中存儲和加載冗餘專家組件的高昂成本。在這項工作中，從任務專家的角度出發，我們將參數干擾視為在合併過程中引入到每個專家的參數擾動。我們表明，這種參數擾動可以建模為仿射變換，可以近似為加性偏移。基於這些動機，我們提出了恢復任務專家（Recover Task eXpert，ReTeX）框架，該框架預測這些偏移，以便撤銷參數干擾並從單個合併檢查點恢復任務專家性能。為了在任務身份未知的情況下恢復適當的專家，我們引入了一種基於離線計算的SVD子空間簽名的無路由任務識別器。在推理過程中，識別器選擇子空間對於給定輸入產生最小投影殘差的任務。因此，ReTeX在視覺和自然語言處理領域中恢復了超過95%的個別專家性能，同時顯著提高了對未見任務的泛化能力。關鍵是，我們還表明，參數偏移預測導致了對於分佈外（OOD）任務的專家知識的自適應插值。ReTeX自適應地插值已見的專家知識以處理未見任務。我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/BAIKLAB/ReTeX 獲得。
2606.26902.author: Jinwook Jung et.al.
2606.26902.authors: Jinwook Jung, Taegyu Kim, Kumju Jo, Sungyong Baik
